mapper.select: SELECT _nextval('probNum')

sql.isPropertyAvailable:
<if test=" property="prob.softVersionParserList"> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="prob.affectedType"> affectedType in (#prob.affectedType#, 0)
'$prob.softVersionParserList[].mark$' between REPLACE( markStart
, '$prob.softVersionParserList[].markAllPartsSet[].key$', '$prob.softVersionParserList[].markAllPartsSet[].value$')
and REPLACE( markEnd
, '$prob.softVersionParserList[].markAllPartsSet[].key$', '$prob.softVersionParserList[].markAllPartsSet[].value$')
sql.isNotPropertyAvailable:
<if test=" softVersionParserList> <if test=" prepend="AND" affectedType> affectedType in (#{affectedType}, 0)
'$softVersionParserList[].mark$' between REPLACE( markStart
, '$softVersionParserList[].markAllPartsSet[].key$', '$softVersionParserList[].markAllPartsSet[].value$')
and REPLACE( markEnd
, '$softVersionParserList[].markAllPartsSet[].key$', '$softVersionParserList[].markAllPartsSet[].value$')

mapper.select:
SELECT count(*) FROM prob_main t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t2 ON t1.`priority` = t2.`basicDataId` AND t2.`dataTypeCode` = '32' AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL
<if test=" prepend=" " checkSoft compareValue="true"> LEFT JOIN ( SELECT probId, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT concat_ws( " ", CONCAT("conp:", conp), CONCAT("cpld:", cpld), CONCAT("boot:", boot), CONCAT("pcb:", pcb), CONCAT("manual:", manualEntry) ) SEPARATOR ";" ) AS affectedVersion, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT affectedType) AS affectedTypes FROM prob_softwares where datastate = 1
GROUP BY probId ) sf ON sf.probId = t1.id
where t1.effectiveTo is null <if test=" prepend="and" probNum> t1.probNum like CONCAT('%', #{probNum}, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" watch> t1.watch = #{watch} <if test=" prepend="and" theme> t1.theme like CONCAT('%', #{theme}, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" status> t1.`status` = #{status} <if test=" prepend="and" statusList> t1.status in
#statusList[]#
<if test=" prepend="and" productType> t1.productType like concat("%", #{productType}, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" desc> t1.desc like concat("%", #{desc}, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" affectedType> sf.probId is not null <if test=" prepend="and" affectedVersion> ( sf.affectedVersion like concat("%", #{affectedVersion}, "%") <if test=" prepend="or" softVersionParserList> sf.probId is not null )
<if test=" visibleRange> <if test=" prepend="and" visibleRange compareValue="-1" open="(" close=")"> t1.visibleRange = #{visibleRange} <if test=" prepend="or" trackingUser> t1.trackingUser = #{trackingUser}
<if test=" customInfo> <if test=" prepend="and" property="customInfo.trackingUserSearch"> t1.trackingUser = #customInfo.trackingUserSearch#
<if test=" prepend="and" relatedSceneTypesMark> t1.`relatedSceneTypesMark` & #{relatedSceneTypesMark} > 0
<if test=" prepend="and" mitigationActionTypesMark> t1.`mitigationActionTypesMark` & #{mitigationActionTypesMark} > 0 <if test=" prepend="and" solutionActionTypesMark> t1.`solutionActionTypesMark` & #{solutionActionTypesMark} > 0 <if test=" prepend="and" probTicketNo> t1.probTicketNo like CONCAT('%', #{probTicketNo}, '%')

SELECT t1.id as probId, t1.probNum, t1.theme, t1.watch, t4.basicDataName as watchName, t2.`basicDataName` AS priority, t2.`basicDataName` AS priorityName, t1.status , t3.basicDataName AS statusName, t1.trackingUser, CONCAT(t1.trackingUser,"-",ui.realName) AS trackingUsername, t1.createTime, t1.updateTime
, t1.customInfo , t1.relatedSceneTypes, t1.relatedSceneTypesMark , t1.mitigationActionTypes, t1.mitigationActionTypesMark , t1.solutionActionTypes, t1.solutionActionTypesMark , t1.probTicketNo FROM prob_main t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.username = t1.trackingUser LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t4 ON t1.`watch` = t4.`basicDataId` AND t4.`dataTypeCode` = '30' AND t4.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t2 ON t1.`priority` = t2.`basicDataId` AND t2.`dataTypeCode` = '32' LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON t1.`status` = t3.basicDataId AND t3.dataTypeCode = '31' AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL <if test=" prepend=" " property="prob.checkSoft" compareValue="true"> LEFT JOIN ( SELECT probId, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT concat_ws( " ", CONCAT("conp:", conp), CONCAT("cpld:", cpld), CONCAT("boot:", boot), CONCAT("pcb:", pcb), CONCAT("manual:", manualEntry) ) SEPARATOR ";" ) AS affectedVersion, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT affectedType) AS affectedTypes FROM prob_softwares where datastate = 1
GROUP BY probId ) sf ON sf.probId = t1.id
WHERE t1.effectiveTo IS NULL <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.probNum"> t1.probNum like CONCAT('%', #prob.probNum#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.watch"> t1.watch = #prob.watch# <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.theme"> t1.theme like CONCAT('%', #prob.theme#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.status"> t1.`status` = #prob.status# <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.statusList"> t1.status in
#prob.statusList[]#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.productType"> t1.productType like concat("%", #prob.productType#, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.desc"> t1.desc like concat("%", #prob.desc#, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.affectedType"> sf.probId is not null <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.affectedVersion"> ( sf.affectedVersion like concat("%", #prob.affectedVersion#, "%") <if test=" prepend="or" property="prob.softVersionParserList"> sf.probId is not null )
<if test=" property="prob.visibleRange"> <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.visibleRange" compareValue="-1" open="(" close=")"> t1.visibleRange = #prob.visibleRange# <if test=" prepend="or" property="prob.trackingUser"> t1.trackingUser = #prob.trackingUser#
<if test=" property="prob.customInfo"> <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.customInfo.trackingUserSearch"> t1.trackingUser = #prob.customInfo.trackingUserSearch#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.relatedSceneTypesMark"> t1.`relatedSceneTypesMark` & #prob.relatedSceneTypesMark# > 0
<if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.mitigationActionTypesMark"> t1.`mitigationActionTypesMark` & #prob.mitigationActionTypesMark# > 0 <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.solutionActionTypesMark"> t1.`solutionActionTypesMark` & #prob.solutionActionTypesMark# > 0
<if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.probTicketNo"> t1.probTicketNo like CONCAT('%', #prob.probTicketNo#, '%')
<if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> $displayParam.sort$ <if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="desc"> desc
<if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="asc"> asc
<if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> t1.createTime desc
<if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.update: UPDATE prob_softwares SET datastate = 0, updateBy = #{updateBy}, updateTime = NOW() WHERE probId = #{probId} and datastate = 1;
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO prob_softwares(probId, conp,cpld,boot, pcb, manualEntry, manualEntrySub, entryType, entrySeries, entryStart, entryEnd, markStart, markEnd, affectedType, groupId, splited, datastate, createBy, createTime, customInfo) VALUES
(#{probId}, #list[].conp#, #list[].cpld#, #list[].boot#, #list[].pcb#, #list[].manualEntry#, #list[].manualEntrySub#, #list[].entryType#, #list[].entrySeries#, #list[].entryStart#, #list[].entryEnd#, #list[].markStart#, #list[].markEnd#, #list[].affectedType#, #list[].groupId#, #list[].splited#, 1, #{createBy}, now() , #list[].customInfo#)
mapper.select:
SELECT ps.*, bd.`basicDataName` as affectedTypeName FROM prob_softwares ps LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'sofeVersionAffectedType' AND ps.`affectedType` = bd.`basicDataId` WHERE ps.datastate = 1
<if test=" prepend="AND" probId> ps.probId = #{probId} <if test=" prepend="AND" splited> ps.splited = #{splited} <if test=" prepend="AND" affectedType> ps.affectedType = #{affectedType}

SELECT t1.*, fi.`itemname` as itemModel, t6.`projectCode`, t6.`projectName`, t6.`column001` AS officeCode, t9.`departmentName` AS officeName, t4.`contractNo` , t6.column004 as marketCode, t6.column004 as marketName , t6.column005 as systemCode, t6.column005 as systemName , t6.column006 as expendCode, t6.column006 as expendName , t6.column007 as industryCode, t6.column007 as industryName
, t2.`probId`, MAX(t6.`projectId`) AS projectId , null AS probNum, null AS theme FROM (SELECT * FROM prob_softwares WHERE datastate = 1 AND manualEntry is null AND probId = #probRestore.probId#) t2 LEFT JOIN (SELECT a1.serial_number AS barCode, CASE WHEN a2.conp IS NULL THEN a1.conp ELSE a2.conp END AS conp, CASE WHEN a2.boot IS NULL THEN a1.boot ELSE a2.boot END AS boot, CASE WHEN a2.cpld IS NULL THEN a1.cpld ELSE a2.cpld END AS cpld, CASE WHEN a2.pcb IS NULL THEN a1.pcb ELSE a2.pcb END AS pcb FROM fb_soft_version a1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_soft_version a2 ON a1.`serial_number` = a2.`barcode` AND a2.`datastate` = 1) t1 ON CASE WHEN t2.`conp` IS NOT NULL THEN t1.`conp` = t2.`conp` ELSE 1 = 1 END AND CASE WHEN t2.`boot` IS NOT NULL THEN t1.`boot` = t2.`boot` ELSE 1 = 1 END AND CASE WHEN t2.`cpld` IS NOT NULL THEN t1.`cpld` = t2.`cpld` ELSE 1 = 1 END AND CASE WHEN t2.`pcb` IS NOT NULL THEN t1.`pcb` = t2.`pcb` ELSE 1 = 1 END INNER JOIN fb_shipment_barcode fsb ON fsb.`barcode` = t1.serial_number AND ( ISNULL(`fsb`.`rma_no`) OR (`fsb`.`rma_no` = '') OR (`fsb`.`rma_no` = 'null') ) INNER JOIN fb_shipment fs ON fs.`packlist_id` = fsb.`pack_id` INNER JOIN fb_contract fc ON fc.`contract_id` = fs.`con_id` INNER JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.`item` = fsb.`item` INNER JOIN pm_project_contract t4 ON fc.`contract_code` = t4.`contractNo` INNER JOIN pm_project_group_relationship t5 ON t4.`projectGroupCode` = t5.`projectGroupCode` INNER JOIN pm_project_header t6 ON t5.`projectCode` = t6.`projectCode` AND ( ( column012 IS NOT NULL AND column012 <> 3 ) OR ( column012 IS NULL AND `columno12_readonly` <> 3 ) ) LEFT JOIN fnd_department t9 ON t6.`column001` = t9.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t10 ON t6.`projectState` = t10.`basicDataId` AND t10.`dataTypeCode` = '02' AND t10.`effectiveTo` IS NULL WHERE t4.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND t5.`projectCode` NOT LIKE '%his' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM prob_restore WHERE serialNum = t1.serial_number AND probId = #probRestore.probId#)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.serialNum"> t1.serial_number like concat(#probRestore.serialNum#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.itemModel"> fi.itemname like concat(#probRestore.itemModel#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.projectName"> t6.projectName like concat('%', #probRestore.projectName#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.contractNo"> t4.contractNo = #probRestore.contractNo# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.officeCode"> t6.column001 = #probRestore.officeCode#
GROUP BY t1.serial_number
mapper.sql:
SELECT sv.id, sv.projectId, sv.logId , sv.contractNo, sv.itemCode, sv.datastate , sv.barCode, sv.conp, sv.conpType, sv.conpSeries, sv.conpMark , sv.conpBak, sv.conpChange, sv.cpld, sv.cpldBak, sv.cpldChange , sv.boot, sv.bootBak, sv.bootChange, sv.pcb, sv.pcbBak , sv.pcbChange, sv.executeTime, sv.createTime, sv.createBy , sv.updateTime, sv.updateBy, sv.customInfo
, fi.itemname AS itemModel , fi.describe_ as itemDesc
, sw.probId, ph.`projectName`
, ph.column001 as officeCode, fdp.departmentName as officeName , ph.column004 as marketCode, ph.column004 as marketName , ph.column005 as systemCode, ph.column005 as systemName , ph.column006 as expendCode, ph.column006 as expendName , ph.column007 as industryCode, ph.column007 as industryName
, ph.projectCode
, pm.probNum, pm.theme

FROM prob_softwares sw INNER JOIN pm_project_soft_version sv ON sv.datastate = sw.datastate AND sv.conpType <=> sw.entryType AND sv.conpSeries <=> sw.entrySeries AND sv.conpMark BETWEEN sw.markStart AND sw.markEnd INNER JOIN prob_product pp ON pp.probId = sw.probId AND pp.itemCode = sv.itemCode AND pp.status = 1 INNER JOIN prob_main pm ON pm.id = sw.probId INNER JOIN pm_project_header ph ON sv.projectId = ph.projectId AND ((column012 IS NOT NULL AND column012 <> 3) OR (column012 IS NULL AND `columno12_readonly` <> 3)) AND ph.effectiveTo IS NULL INNER JOIN pm_project_group_relationship pgr ON pgr.`projectCode` = ph.`projectCode` INNER JOIN pm_project_contract pc ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pgr.`projectGroupCode` AND pc.contractNo = sv.contractNo LEFT JOIN fnd_department fdp ON ph.`column001` = fdp.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.item = sv.itemCode WHERE sv.datastate = 1 AND pc.`contractNo` IS NOT NULL AND ph.`projectCode` NOT LIKE '%his'
<if test=" property="probRestore.probId"> <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.probId" compareValue="0"> sw.probId = #probRestore.probId# AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM prob_restore WHERE serialNum = sv.barcode AND probId = #probRestore.probId#)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.serialNum"> sv.barcode like concat(#probRestore.serialNum#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.itemModel"> fi.itemname like concat(#probRestore.itemModel#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.projectCode"> ph.projectCode like concat(#probRestore.projectCode#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.projectName"> ph.projectName like concat('%', #probRestore.projectName#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.contractNo"> pc.contractNo = #probRestore.contractNo# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.officeCode"> ph.column001 = #probRestore.officeCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.marketCode"> ph.column004 = #probRestore.marketCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.systemCode"> ph.column005 = #probRestore.systemCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.expendCode"> ph.column006 = #probRestore.expendCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.industryCode"> ph.column007 = #probRestore.industryCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.areapower"> ph.column001 in ($probRestore.areapower$)
<if test=" property="probRestore.prob"> <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.prob.probNum"> pm.probNum = #probRestore.prob.probNum#
<if test=" property="probRestore.version"> <if test=" property="probRestore.version.conp">
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="probRestore.version.entryType"> sw.entryType = #probRestore.version.entryType# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probRestore.version.entrySeries"> sw.entrySeries = #probRestore.version.entrySeries# AND ( sv.conp = #probRestore.version.conp# <if test=" prepend="OR" property="probRestore.version.conpMark"> (#probRestore.version.conpMark# BETWEEN sw.markStart AND sw.markEnd) )
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="probRestore.version.boot"> sv.boot = #probRestore.version.boot# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probRestore.version.cpld"> sv.cpld = #probRestore.version.cpld# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probRestore.version.pcb"> sv.pcb = #probRestore.version.pcb#
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)
<if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> LIMIT #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO prob_restore(probId, serialNum , itemModel, processId, officeCode, conp, boot, cpld, pcb, projectId,projectName, contractNo,assignee, assigneeRole, createBy, createTime ) VALUES
<if test=" compareValue="1" property="list[].ischecked"> ( #probRestore.probId# , #list[].serialNum# , #list[].itemModel# , #probRestore.processId# , #list[].officeCode# , #list[].conp# , #list[].boot# , #list[].cpld# , #list[].pcb# ,#list[].projectId# , #list[].projectName# , #list[].contractNo# , #probRestore.assignee# , #probRestore.assigneeRole# , #{createBy} , now())
mapper.select:
SELECT a1.* , a2.`basicDataName` AS restoreStatusName ,a3.`departmentName` AS officeName, a4.restoreRemark ,a4.restoreStatus ,sv.`conp` , sv.`boot` ,sv.`cpld` ,sv.`pcb` ,sv.`executeTime` , CASE WHEN a6.realName IS NOT NULL THEN a6.realName ELSE '服务经理' END AS assigneeName
, ph.projectCode , ph.column004 as marketCode, ph.column004 as marketName , ph.column005 as systemCode, ph.column005 as systemName , ph.column006 as expendCode, ph.column006 as expendName , ph.column007 as industryCode, ph.column007 as industryName
, JSON_EXTRACT((
AND sw.probId = #probRestore.probId# ), '$$[0]') AS prob FROM prob_restore a1 LEFT JOIN prob_restore_process a4 ON a1.processId = a4.id LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data a2 ON a4.`restoreStatus` = a2.`basicDataId` AND a2.`dataTypeCode` = '33' LEFT JOIN fnd_department a3 ON a1.`officeCode` = a3.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN pm_project_soft_version sv ON a1.`serialNum` = sv.`barcode` AND sv.`datastate` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_header ph ON ph.projectId = sv.projectId LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info a6 ON a1.`assignee` = a6.`username` WHERE a1.probId = #probRestore.probId# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.assignee">
(a1.assignee = #probRestore.assignee#
<if test=" prepend="OR" property="probRestore.areapower">
(a1.officeCode in ($probRestore.areapower$)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.assigneeRole"> a1.assigneeRole = #probRestore.assigneeRole# )
)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.officeCode"> a1.officeCode = #probRestore.officeCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.projectName"> a1.projectName like concat('%', #probRestore.projectName#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.serialNum"> a1.serialNum = #probRestore.serialNum# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.itemModel"> a1.itemModel like concat(#probRestore.itemModel#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.contractNo"> a1.contractNo = #probRestore.contractNo#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.projectCode"> ph.projectCode like concat(#probRestore.projectCode#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.marketCode"> ph.column004 = #probRestore.marketCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.systemCode"> ph.column005 = #probRestore.systemCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.expendCode"> ph.column006 = #probRestore.expendCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.industryCode"> ph.column007 = #probRestore.industryCode#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.restoreStatus" compareValue="0"> a4.restoreStatus = #probRestore.restoreStatus#
<if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> $displayParam.sort$ <if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="desc"> desc
<if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="asc"> asc
<if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset# , #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT a1.* , a2.`basicDataName` AS restoreStatusName ,a3.`departmentName` AS officeName, a4.restoreRemark ,a4.restoreStatus ,sv.`conp` , sv.`boot` ,sv.`cpld` ,sv.`pcb` ,sv.`executeTime` , CASE WHEN a6.realName IS NOT NULL THEN a6.realName ELSE '服务经理' END AS assigneeName
, ph.projectCode , ph.column004 as marketCode, ph.column004 as marketName , ph.column005 as systemCode, ph.column005 as systemName , ph.column006 as expendCode, ph.column006 as expendName , ph.column007 as industryCode, ph.column007 as industryName
, JSON_EXTRACT((
AND sw.probId = #probRestore.probId# ), '$$[0]') AS prob FROM prob_restore a1 LEFT JOIN prob_restore_process a4 ON a1.processId = a4.id LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data a2 ON a4.`restoreStatus` = a2.`basicDataId` AND a2.`dataTypeCode` = '33' LEFT JOIN fnd_department a3 ON a1.`officeCode` = a3.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN pm_project_soft_version sv ON a1.`serialNum` = sv.`barcode` AND sv.`datastate` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_header ph ON ph.projectId = sv.projectId LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info a6 ON a1.`assignee` = a6.`username` WHERE a1.probId = #probRestore.probId# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.assignee">
(a1.assignee = #probRestore.assignee#
<if test=" prepend="OR" property="probRestore.areapower">
(a1.officeCode in ($probRestore.areapower$)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.assigneeRole"> a1.assigneeRole = #probRestore.assigneeRole# )
)
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.officeCode"> a1.officeCode = #probRestore.officeCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.projectName"> a1.projectName like concat('%', #probRestore.projectName#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.serialNum"> a1.serialNum = #probRestore.serialNum# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.itemModel"> a1.itemModel like concat(#probRestore.itemModel#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.contractNo"> a1.contractNo = #probRestore.contractNo#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.projectCode"> ph.projectCode like concat(#probRestore.projectCode#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.marketCode"> ph.column004 = #probRestore.marketCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.systemCode"> ph.column005 = #probRestore.systemCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.expendCode"> ph.column006 = #probRestore.expendCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.industryCode"> ph.column007 = #probRestore.industryCode#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probRestore.restoreStatus" compareValue="0"> a4.restoreStatus = #probRestore.restoreStatus#
GROUP BY a1.projectId, a1.assignee, a1.assigneeRole, a4.restoreStatus <if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> $displayParam.sort$ <if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="desc"> desc
<if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="asc"> asc
<if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset# , #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.update: UPDATE prob_restore SET assignee = #{assignee},assigneeRole = 0 ,updateBy = #{updateBy},updateTime = now() WHERE FIND_IN_SET(id, #{restoreIds});
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prob_restore_process WHERE probId = #{probId}
mapper.update: UPDATE prob_main SET effectiveTo = NOW() ,updateBy = #{updateBy}, updateTime = now() WHERE id = #{probId}
mapper.select: SELECT fileName,filePath FROM fnd_files WHERE FIND_IN_SET(id , #{fileIds});

SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT t2.email SEPARATOR ';') as emails FROM prob_restore t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info t2 ON t1.`assignee` = t2.`username` AND t2.`status` = 1 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(t1.`id`, #{restoreIds})

SELECT pr.`serialNum` AS barCode, pr.`itemModel` AS itemName, pr.`projectId`, sv.`conp`, sv.`conpBak`, sv.`conpChange`, sv.`boot`, sv.`bootBak`, sv.`bootChange`, sv.`cpld`, sv.`cpldBak`, sv.`cpldChange`, sv.`pcb`, sv.`pcbBak`, sv.`pcbChange`, sv.`executeTime`, sv.`createTime` FROM `prob_restore` pr LEFT JOIN `pm_project_soft_version` sv ON pr.`serialNum` = sv.`barcode` AND sv.`datastate` = 1 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_soft_change_logs` scl ON pr.`projectId` = scl.`projectId` AND scl.`latest` = 1 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pr.id, #{restoreIds})
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ui.email SEPARATOR ';') FROM `prob_restore` pr LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON pr.`officeCode` = ui.`dpNo` AND ui.`status` = 1 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(pr.id, #{restoreIds})

SELECT t1.*, t2.`basicDataName` AS priorityName, t4.`basicDataName` AS watchName, t3.basicDataName AS statusName, CONCAT(t1.trackingUser, "-", ui.realName) AS trackingUsername, sf.affectedVersion FROM prob_main t1 LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON ui.username = t1.trackingUser LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t2 ON t1.`priority` = t2.`basicDataId` AND t2.`dataTypeCode` = '32' AND t2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t3 ON t1.`status` = t3.basicDataId AND t3.dataTypeCode = '31' AND t3.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data t4 ON t1.`watch` = t4.basicDataId AND t4.dataTypeCode = '30' AND t4.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN (SELECT probId, GROUP_CONCAT( DISTINCT CONCAT(bd.`basicDataName`, ":", CONCAT_WS( "-", CONCAT("conp[", conp, "]"), CONCAT("cpld[", cpld, "]"), CONCAT("boot[", boot, "]"), CONCAT("pcb[", pcb, "]"), CONCAT("", manualEntry, "") )) SEPARATOR ";\r\n" ) AS affectedVersion, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT affectedType) AS affectedTypes FROM `prob_softwares` ps LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data bd ON bd.`dataTypeCode` = 'sofeVersionAffectedType' AND ps.`affectedType` = bd.`basicDataId` WHERE datastate = 1
GROUP BY probId) sf ON sf.probId = t1.`id` WHERE t1.effectiveTo IS NULL <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.probNum"> t1.probNum like CONCAT('%', #prob.probNum#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.watch"> t1.watch = #prob.watch# <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.theme"> t1.theme like CONCAT('%', #prob.theme#, '%') <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.status"> t1.`status` = #prob.status# <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.statusList"> t1.status in
#prob.statusList[]#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.productType"> t1.productType like concat("%", #prob.productType#, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.desc"> t1.desc like concat("%", #prob.desc#, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.affectedType"> sf.probId is not null <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.affectedVersion"> ( sf.affectedVersion like concat("%", #prob.affectedVersion#, "%") <if test=" prepend="or" property="prob.softVersionParserList"> sf.probId is not null )
<if test=" property="prob.visibleRange"> <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.visibleRange" compareValue="-1" open="(" close=")"> t1.visibleRange = #prob.visibleRange# <if test=" prepend="or" property="prob.trackingUser"> t1.trackingUser = #prob.trackingUser#
<if test=" property="prob.customInfo"> <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.customInfo.trackingUserSearch"> t1.trackingUser = #prob.customInfo.trackingUserSearch#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.relatedSceneTypesMark"> t1.`relatedSceneTypesMark` & #prob.relatedSceneTypesMark# > 0
<if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.mitigationActionTypesMark"> t1.`mitigationActionTypesMark` & #prob.mitigationActionTypesMark# > 0 <if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.solutionActionTypesMark"> t1.`solutionActionTypesMark` & #prob.solutionActionTypesMark# > 0
<if test=" prepend="and" property="prob.probTicketNo"> t1.probTicketNo like CONCAT('%', #prob.probTicketNo#, '%')
mapper.insert:
INSERT IGNORE INTO prob_soft_version(conp, cpld, boot, pcb, createdBy) VALUES
(#list[].conp#, #list[].cpld#, #list[].boot#, #list[].pcb#, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: select count(*) from statistic_tempTable

select * from statistic_tempTable <if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> $displayParam.sort$ <if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="desc"> desc
<if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="asc"> asc
<if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> executeTime desc
<if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.insert:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS statistic_tempTable SELECT ph.`projectId`, ph.`projectCode`, ph.`projectName`, sf.itemName, sf.softInfo, ph.`column001` AS officeCode, fd.`departmentName` AS officeName, sm.memberCode AS serviceManagerCode, sm.`memberName` AS serviceManagerName, pm1.memberCode AS programManagerCodeA, pm1.`memberName` AS programManagerNameA, pm2.memberCode AS programManagerCodeB, pm2.`memberName` AS programManagerNameB, MAX(sf.executeTime) AS executeTime, sf.updateCount, MAX(sf.probId) AS probId, pbm.`theme` AS probTheme FROM softChangeLog_tempTable sf LEFT JOIN pm_project_header ph ON sf.projectId = ph.`projectId` LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm1 ON ph.`projectId` = pm1.`projectId` AND pm1.`memberRole` = "30" AND pm1.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm1.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON ph.`projectId` = pm2.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = "30" AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm1.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON ph.`projectId` = sm.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = "20" AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd ON ph.`column001` = fd.`departmentNum` LEFT JOIN prob_main pbm ON pbm.id = sf.probId
GROUP BY sf.projectId, sf.itemName
mapper.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS statistic_tempTable
DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS softChangeLog_tempTable
mapper.select: SELECT t.column001 AS officeCode, t.officeName, COUNT(DISTINCT s.projectId) AS conditionValue, COUNT(DISTINCT t.projectId) AS totalValue, CONCAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.projectId)/COUNT(DISTINCT t.projectId) * 100, 2) ,'%') AS specificValue FROM projectTempTable t LEFT JOIN statistic_tempTable s ON s.projectId = t.projectId GROUP BY t.column001 ORDER BY specificValue DESC, conditionValue DESC, totalValue DESC
mapper.insert:
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projectTempTable SELECT ph.*, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT pc.`contractNo`) AS contractNo, ph.column001 as officeCode, fd.departmentName AS officeName
, ph.column004 as marketCode, ph.column004 as marketName , ph.column005 as systemCode, ph.column005 as systemName , ph.column006 as expendCode, ph.column006 as expendName , ph.column007 as industryCode, ph.column007 as industryName
, fbd.`basicDataName` AS projectStateName, sm.`memberCode` AS serviceManagerCode, sm.`memberName` AS serviceManagerCodeforjson, pm1.`memberCode` AS programManagerCodeA, pm1.`memberName` AS programManagerCodeforjson, pm2.`memberCode` AS programManagerCodeB, pm2.`memberName` AS programManagerCodeforjsonB , CASE WHEN ph.salesType = '14' THEN ph.column001 ELSE NULL END AS checkProfitCenter FROM pm_project_header ph LEFT JOIN pm_project_group_relationship pgr ON ph.`projectCode` = pgr.`projectCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project_group pg ON pgr.`projectGroupCode` = pg.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN pm_project_contract pc ON pc.`projectGroupCode` = pg.`projectGroupCode` LEFT JOIN fnd_department fd ON fd.`departmentNum` = ph.column001 LEFT JOIN fnd_basic_data fbd ON fbd.`basicDataId` = ph.`projectState` AND fbd.`dataTypeCode` = "02" LEFT JOIN pm_project_member sm ON sm.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND sm.`memberRole` = "20" AND sm.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND sm.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm1 ON pm1.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND pm1.`memberRole` = "30" AND pm1.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm1.`fromFlag` = 1 LEFT JOIN pm_project_member pm2 ON pm2.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND pm2.`memberRole` = "30" AND pm2.`effectiveTo` IS NULL AND pm2.`fromFlag` = 2 LEFT JOIN `pm_project_soft_change_logs` pscl ON pscl.`projectId` = ph.`projectId` AND pscl.`latest` = 1 WHERE ( ph.`column012` = 0 OR ph.`columno12_readonly` = 0 OR pscl.id IS NOT NULL ) AND ph.`effectiveTo` IS NULL
GROUP BY ph.`projectCode`
mapper.delete: DROP TEMPORARY TABLE IF EXISTS projectTempTable
mapper.select:
select * from projectTempTable
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.projectCode"> (projectCode like CONCAT("%", #probStatistic.projectCode#, "%") or contractNo like CONCAT("%", #probStatistic.projectCode#, "%")) <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.projectName"> projectName like CONCAT("%", #probStatistic.projectName#, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.officeCode"> officeCode = #probStatistic.officeCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.programManagerCode"> (programManagerCodeA = #probStatistic.programManagerCode# or programManagerCodeB = #probStatistic.programManagerCode#) <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.serviceManagerCode"> serviceManagerCode = #probStatistic.serviceManagerCode#
<if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> $displayParam.sort$ <if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="desc"> desc
<if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="asc"> asc
<if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT "total" as officeCode, "全国" as officeName, SUM(conditionValue) AS conditionValue, SUM(totalValue) AS totalValue, CONCAT( ROUND( SUM(conditionValue) / SUM(totalValue) * 100, 2 ), '%' ) AS specificValue FROM (SELECT t.column001 AS officeCode, t.officeName, COUNT(DISTINCT s.projectId) AS conditionValue, COUNT(DISTINCT t.projectId) AS totalValue, CONCAT(ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT s.projectId)/COUNT(DISTINCT t.projectId) * 100, 2) ,'%') AS specificValue FROM projectTempTable t LEFT JOIN statistic_tempTable s ON s.projectId = t.projectId GROUP BY t.column001) t
mapper.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT IFNULL(ph.projectId, 0) AS projectId, ph.projectCode, ph.projectName , ph.officeCode AS `officeCode`, ph.officeName AS `officeName` , ph.marketCode as marketCode, ph.marketName as marketName , ph.systemCode as systemCode, ph.systemName as systemName , ph.expendCode as expendCode, ph.expendName as expendName , ph.industryCode as industryCode, ph.industryName as industryName
, ph.projectStateName AS `projectStateName` , ph.serviceManagerCode AS `serviceManagerCode`, ph.serviceManagerCodeforjson AS `serviceManagerCodeforjson` , ph.programManagerCodeA AS `programManagerCodeA`, ph.programManagerCodeforjson AS `programManagerCodeforjson` , ph.programManagerCodeB AS `programManagerCodeB`, ph.programManagerCodeforjsonB AS `programManagerCodeforjsonB`
, vsip.contract_code AS contractNo, vsip.barcode AS barCode, vsip.itemCode AS itemCode, vsip.itemModel AS itemModel, vsip.itemName AS itemName , CASE WHEN t3.conp IS NULL THEN t.`conp` ELSE t3.conp END AS conp, t3.conpBak, IFNULL(t3.conpChange, 0) conpChange , CASE WHEN t3.boot IS NULL THEN t.`boot` ELSE t3.boot END AS boot, t3.bootBak, IFNULL(t3.bootChange, 0) bootChange , CASE WHEN t3.cpld IS NULL THEN t.`cpld` ELSE t3.cpld END AS cpld, t3.cpldBak, IFNULL(t3.cpldChange, 0) cpldChange , CASE WHEN t3.pcb IS NULL THEN t.`pcb` ELSE t3.pcb END AS pcb, t3.pcbBak, IFNULL(t3.pcbChange, 0) pcbChange , vsip.barcode2 AS barCode2, vsip.itemCode2 AS itemCode2 , vsip.itemModel2 AS itemModel2 , vsip.itemName2 AS itemName2 FROM view_shipment_info_4_pm vsip LEFT JOIN view_shipment_ems_4_pm vsep ON vsep.contract_code = vsip.contract_code AND vsep.packId = vsip.packId LEFT JOIN fb_soft_version t ON vsip.`barcode` = t.`serial_number` LEFT JOIN fb_items fi ON fi.item = vsip.itemCode LEFT JOIN pm_project_contract ppc ON ppc.contractno = vsep.contract_code LEFT JOIN pm_project_group_relationship ppgr ON ppgr.projectGroupCode = ppc.projectGroupCode LEFT JOIN projectTempTable ph ON ph.projectCode = ppgr.projectCode LEFT JOIN pm_project_soft_version t3 ON vsip.`barcode` = t3.`barcode` AND t3.`datastate` = 1 AND ph.`projectId` = t3.`projectId` WHERE (ph.checkProfitCenter IS NULL or ph.officeCode = IFNULL(vsip.profitCenter, ph.officeCode)) <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.projectCode"> (ph.projectCode like CONCAT("%", #probStatistic.projectCode#, "%") or ph.contractNo like CONCAT("%", #probStatistic.projectCode#, "%")) <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.projectName"> ph.projectName like CONCAT("%", #probStatistic.projectName#, "%") <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.officeCode"> ph.officeCode = #probStatistic.officeCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.marketCode"> ph.marketCode = #probStatistic.marketCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.systemCode"> ph.systemCode = #probStatistic.systemCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.expendCode"> ph.expendCode = #probStatistic.expendCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.industryCode"> ph.industryCode = #probStatistic.industryCode#
<if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.programManagerCode"> (ph.programManagerCodeA = #probStatistic.programManagerCode# or ph.programManagerCodeB = #probStatistic.programManagerCode#) <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.serviceManagerCode"> ph.serviceManagerCode = #probStatistic.serviceManagerCode# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.contractNo"> vsip.contract_code = #probStatistic.contractNo# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.barCode"> (vsip.barCode = #probStatistic.barCode# or vsip.barcode2 = #probStatistic.barCode#) <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.itemCode"> (vsip.itemCode = #probStatistic.itemCode# or vsip.itemCode2 = #probStatistic.itemCode#) <if test=" prepend="and" property="probStatistic.itemModel"> (vsip.itemModel like CONCAT(#probStatistic.itemModel#, "%") or vsip.itemModel2 like CONCAT(#probStatistic.itemModel#, "%"))
<if test=" property="probStatistic.version"> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probStatistic.version.conp"> t3.conp = #probStatistic.version.conp# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probStatistic.version.boot"> t3.boot = #probStatistic.version.boot# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probStatistic.version.cpld"> t3.cpld = #probStatistic.version.cpld# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probStatistic.version.pcb"> t3.pcb = #probStatistic.version.pcb#
<if test=" prepend="AND" itemFilters>
<if test=" property="probStatistic.version"> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probStatistic.version.conp"> conp = #probStatistic.version.conp# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probStatistic.version.boot"> boot = #probStatistic.version.boot# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probStatistic.version.cpld"> cpld = #probStatistic.version.cpld# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="probStatistic.version.pcb"> pcb = #probStatistic.version.pcb#
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (
) t <if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> $displayParam.sort$ <if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="desc"> desc
<if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="asc"> asc
<if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

<if test=" prepend=" order by " property="displayParam.sort"> $displayParam.sort$ <if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="desc"> desc
<if test=" prepend=" " property="displayParam.order" compareValue="asc"> asc
<if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#

SELECT rl.*, IFNULL( CONCAT(ui.`username`, "-", ui.`realName`), rl.reader ) AS readerName FROM prob_read_log rl LEFT JOIN fnd_user_info ui ON rl.`reader` = ui.`username` where rl.probId = #probReadLog.probId# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probReadLog.reader"> rl.reader = #probReadLog.reader# <if test=" prepend="and" property="probReadLog.status"> rl.status = #probReadLog.status# order by rl.readTime desc <if test=" property="displayParam.offset"> limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into prob_product_component (`type`, `name`, `version`, `parentId`, `state`, `customInfo`, `createBy`, `createTime`, `updateBy`, `updateTime`) values (#{type}, #{name}, #{version}, #{parentId}, #{state}, #{customInfo}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update:
update prob_product_component set `type` = #{type}, `name` = #{name}, `version` = #{version}, `parentId` = #{parentId}, `state` = #{state}, `createBy` = #{createBy}, `createTime` = #{createTime}, `updateBy` = #{updateBy}, `updateTime` = #{updateTime},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# ) where `id` = #{id}
mapper.sql:
<if test=" prepend="AND" id> pc.`id` = #{id} 
	    
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" type> pc.`type` like CONCAT('%', #{type}, '%') 
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" name> pc.`name` like CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') 
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" version> pc.`version` = #{version} 
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" parentId> pc.`parentId` = #{parentId} 
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" state> pc.`state` = #{state} 
	    
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" createBy> pc.`createBy` = #{createBy} 
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" createTime> pc.`createTime` = #{createTime} 
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" updateBy> pc.`updateBy` = #{updateBy} 
	    <if test=" prepend="AND" updateTime> pc.`updateTime` = #{updateTime}

<if test=" prepend="AND" property="model != null "> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.id"> pc.`id` = #model.id#
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.type"> pc.`type` like CONCAT('%', #model.type#, '%') <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.name"> pc.`name` like CONCAT('%', #model.name#, '%') <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.version"> pc.`version` = #model.version# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.parentId"> pc.`parentId` = #model.parentId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.state"> pc.`state` = #model.state#
<if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.createBy"> pc.`createBy` = #model.createBy# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.createTime"> pc.`createTime` = #model.createTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.updateBy"> pc.`updateBy` = #model.updateBy# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.updateTime"> pc.`updateTime` = #model.updateTime#
<if test=" prepend="AND" fuzzySearch> ( pc.`type` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pc.`name` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pc.`version` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

<if test=" displayParam> <if test=" property="displayParam.sort"> order by $displayParam.sort$
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.select: select * from prob_product_component AS `pc`
select count(1) from prob_product_component AS `pc`
select * from prob_product_component AS `pc`
select count(1) from prob_product_component AS `pc`
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into prob_product (`probId`, `productCode`, `productSubCode`, `itemCode`, `itemModel`, `itemDesc`, `status`, `customInfo`, `createBy`, `createTime`, `updateBy`, `updateTime` ) values (#{probId}, #{productCode}, #{productSubCode}, #{itemCode}, #{itemModel}, #{itemDesc}, #{status}, #{customInfo}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
update prob_product set `probId` = #{probId}, `productCode` = #{productCode}, `productSubCode` = #{productSubCode}, `itemCode` = #{itemCode}, `itemModel` = #{itemModel}, `itemDesc` = #{itemDesc}, `status` = #{status},
customInfo = JSON_MERGE_PATCH(IFNULL(customInfo, "{}"), #customInfo:JSON# ), `createBy` = #{createBy}, `createTime` = #{createTime}, `updateBy` = #{updateBy}, `updateTime` = #{updateTime} where `id` = #{id}
mapper.sql:
<if test=" prepend="AND" id> pp.`id` = #{id} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" probId> pp.`probId` = #{probId} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" productCode> pp.`productCode` = #{productCode} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" productSubCode> pp.`productSubCode` = #{productSubCode} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" itemCode> pp.`itemCode` = #{itemCode} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" itemModel> pp.`itemModel` = #{itemModel} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" itemDesc> pp.`itemDesc` = #{itemDesc} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" status> pp.`status` = #{status} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" customInfo> pp.`customInfo` = #{customInfo} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" createBy> pp.`createBy` = #{createBy} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" createTime> pp.`createTime` = #{createTime} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" updateBy> pp.`updateBy` = #{updateBy} 
		<if test=" prepend="AND" updateTime> pp.`updateTime` = #{updateTime}

<if test=" prepend="AND" model> <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.id"> pp.`id` = #model.id# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.probId"> pp.`probId` = #model.probId# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.productCode"> pp.`productCode` = #model.productCode# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.productSubCode"> pp.`productSubCode` = #model.productSubCode# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.itemCode"> pp.`itemCode` = #model.itemCode# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.itemModel"> pp.`itemModel` = #model.itemModel# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.itemDesc"> pp.`itemDesc` = #model.itemDesc# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.status"> pp.`status` = #model.status# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.customInfo"> pp.`customInfo` = #model.customInfo# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.createBy"> pp.`createBy` = #model.createBy# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.createTime"> pp.`createTime` = #model.createTime# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.updateBy"> pp.`updateBy` = #model.updateBy# <if test=" prepend="AND" property="model.updateTime"> pp.`updateTime` = #model.updateTime#
<if test=" prepend="AND" fuzzySearch> ( pp.`probId` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.`productCode` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.`productSubCode` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.`itemCode` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.`itemModel` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.`itemDesc` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.`createBy` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or pp.`updateBy` like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )

<if test=" displayParam> <if test=" property="displayParam.sort"> order by $displayParam.sort$
limit #displayParam.offset#, #displayParam.pagesize#
mapper.select: select * from prob_product AS `pp`
select count(1) from prob_product AS `pp`
select * from prob_product AS `pp`
select count(1) from prob_product AS `pp`

SELECT item AS itemCode, itemName as itemModel, describe_ AS itemDesc FROM fb_items fi
<if test=" prepend="AND" itemCode> fi.item LIKE CONCAT(#{itemCode}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" itemModel> fi.item LIKE CONCAT(#{itemModel}, "%") <if test=" prepend="AND" itemGroups>
<if test=" prepend="AND" itemFilters>

SELECT item AS itemCode, itemName as itemModel, describe_ AS itemDesc FROM fb_items fi
<if test=" prepend="AND" itemGroups>
<if test=" prepend="AND" itemFilters>
